title: paspalum crassum
intro: Paspalum crassum, also known as the thick-leaved paspalum, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum crassum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea or infused into a decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
